approvalSource: Steve explicitly requested a full regroup, resurrection of buried V1 product promises, and a durable solution so partial V1 cards cannot be marked fully complete without continuation work.
scopeSummary: Add promise-to-proof ship gating, open product continuation cards, link historical V1 cards to continuations, and close only the process gate while leaving product continuations open.
constraints: Do not build GOD-mode extractor in this process gate.
Do not close product continuation cards.
Do not run private Skool/MyICOR navigation, paid/provider work, browser-auth extraction, sends, Drive permission mutation, or external writes.
The target card itself must not count as its own continuation.
Future partial V1 capability closeouts must name a separate open continuation card.
